Security-phase review of commit d1e74a1f (HEAD of origin/main; 26 files, +6063/-71) covering spec 052 Scopes 1-4 source surface. SCOPE: full security review of the bundle-secret-injection contract across the 5 numbered surfaces (config.sh placeholder emit + secret-keys.yaml + bundle-manifest; secret_keys.go canonical mirror + IsPlaceholder; config.go::Validate FR-052-007 rejection; auth/startup.go::ValidateRuntimeAuthStartup FR-052-007 rejection; bundle_secret_contract_test.go A1-A4 adversarial tests). VERIFICATION OF 9 CHECKS: (a) Error messages do NOT echo the placeholder marker literal — verified in both Validate() (config.go:1499 'fmt.Errorf(%s still equals placeholder marker — adapter substitution failed (spec 052 FR-052-007), key)' uses KEY only) and ValidateRuntimeAuthStartup (startup.go:91/102 paired branches with byte-identical 'AUTH_*_KEY still equals placeholder marker' format, KEY only). (b) Error messages do NOT echo the resolved secret value — verified by structural argument-shape analysis (only %s of KEY name is interpolated; no value is on the call path) AND by live test TestRuntimeRejection_NameKeyOnly_NoValueLeakage which seeds LEAKCANARY-* sentinels in every other secret slot and asserts no canary substring appears in the error.
